items.title: Lazymod
items.text: Aliases for launching terminal UIs in the lazy tool family. Provides short commands for docker, git, and ssh dashboards.

items.title: Changelog
items.text: All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. See commit-and-tag-version for commit guidelines.

items.title: Features
items.text:
• alias: add ld alias for lazydocker (255adb3)
  • alias: add lg alias for lazygit (f9c6f6e)
  • alias: add lsh alias for lazyssh (f618602)
